## Runtime.IRuntimeRecipe.scale() method

Scales the golden version to a target weight.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scale(targetWeight: Grams, options?: IRecipeScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledRecipeVersion>;
```
